# Credits

NexusTimer makes use of third-party code. We are grateful to the authors and contributors of the cstimer project.

---

**Repository:** https://github.com/cs0x7f/cstimer
**Author:** cs0x7f
**License:** [GNU General Public License v3.0](https://www.gnu.org/licenses/gpl-3.0.html)

The following files are derived from cstimer and are located under `src/js/hardware`:

- `bluetooth.js`
- `gancube.js`
- `gantimer.js`
- `giikercube.js`
- `gocube.js`
- `moyu32cube.js`
- `moyucube.js`
- `qiyicube.js`
- `qiyitimer.js`
- `stackmat.js`

These files provide hardware connectivity support for Bluetooth smart cubes and Stackmat timers. They are used as-is from the cstimer project and are subject to the terms of the GPL-3.0 license.

In accordance with GPL-3.0, the source code for these files is available at the cstimer repository linked above.
